overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting the view from a cargo vessel's bridge at night. The vessel navigates through open water with overcast skies, featuring working radar and navigation displays while the camera remains mostly steady with a brief pan to starboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo ship bridge with navigation consoles

agents.ego_description: navigating the cargo ship through coastal waters from the bridge, monitoring the rotating radar display and navigation charts

entered.detail: left display showing nautical chart with coastline
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep arm
right display showing vessel data and readouts
red-painted bow deck of the cargo vessel with railings
metal safety railing along the left side of the bow
metal safety railing along the right side of the bow
dark choppy water extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily forward through dark waters at night. Three navigation monitors are visible overhead, with the center radar display actively sweeping. The red foredeck is centered in the view, flanked by safety railings, while the ocean stretches ahead under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo ship bridge with navigation consoles

events.description: camera pans right to observe the starboard side and surrounding waters

agents.ego_description: briefly scanning the starboard side and waters to the right before resuming forward navigation

entered.detail: metal structural frame of the bridge window becomes visible during the rightward pan

segments.scene_description: The camera briefly pans right to survey the starboard side, causing the foredeck to shift left in the frame and revealing the starboard window frame. After a quick scan, the view returns to center as the ship continues its steady course through the dark waters, with the radar display continuing its rotation overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady forward progression from a ship's bridge that briefly deviates from its central path to survey the surrounding dark waters. It begins with a centered view of the red foredeck and safety railings, while overhead navigation monitors and a sweeping radar display track the vessel's movement under overcast night skies. As the camera pans to the right, the foredeck shifts leftward to reveal the starboard window frame and the open ocean beyond. The view then smoothly returns to the center, aligning once more with the ship's course as the radar continues its rhythmic rotation above the dark horizon.
